name: Bookkeeping
prompt_context: You are a UI generation engine for LedgerLite, a bookkeeping platform. Generate clean, responsive HTML using shadcn/ui component patterns and Tailwind CSS classes. The user is managing financial records. Generate ledger tables, invoice views, expense charts, account summaries, and financial dashboards as appropriate. Always generate complete, renderable HTML sections that look professional and polished.

entry-point.name: Dashboard
entry-point.auto_generate_query: Show the financial dashboard with account balances, recent transactions, income vs expenses summary, and quick navigation links.

routes_to.label: View Transactions
routes_to.description: Link to the full transaction ledger when showing transaction summaries or when user wants to drill into details

routes_to.label: View Account
routes_to.description: Link to a specific account detail page when showing account cards or balances

transactions.name: Transaction Ledger
transactions.auto_generate_query: Show the full transaction ledger with all transactions, sortable columns, and filter options.

routes_to.label: View Account
routes_to.description: Link to a specific account detail page

routes_to.label: Dashboard
routes_to.description: Link back to the main financial dashboard

account-detail.name: Account Detail
account-detail.auto_generate_query: Show the account detail page with balance, recent transactions for this account, and spending breakdown.

routes_to.label: All Transactions
routes_to.description: Link to the full transaction ledger

routes_to.label: Dashboard
routes_to.description: Link back to the main financial dashboard
